badges.name: First Blood
badges.hint: Mark any benefit as used to unlock

badges.name: Break Even
badges.description: Any card hits B grade (100% ROI)
badges.hint: Get any card to break even on its annual fee

badges.name: Money Printer
badges.description: Any card hits A+ grade (200%+ ROI)
badges.hint: Capture 2x a card's annual fee in benefits

badges.name: Diversified
badges.hint: Add cards from at least 3 different issuers

badges.name: Streak Starter
badges.hint: Use 80%+ of monthly benefits for 3 consecutive months

badges.name: Streak Lord
badges.hint: Use 80%+ of monthly benefits for 6 consecutive months

badges.name: Full Send
badges.description: 100% benefits used in a single month
badges.hint: Use every single benefit in one month

badges.name: Stacked
badges.hint: Add 5 or more cards to your wallet

badges.name: Zero Waste
badges.description: No expired unused benefits in a month
badges.hint: Don't let any benefits expire unused

badges.name: Fee Crusher
badges.description: All cards grade B or above
badges.hint: Make every card earn its annual fee

badges.name: Wallet Elite
badges.hint: Optimize your wallet to reach a 90+ score

badges.name: Roasted
badges.hint: Try the Roast My Wallet feature
